game.name: OpenGOAL - Jak and Daxter
game.desc: Native OpenGOAL port. Place your own clean PS2 Jak and Daxter ISO in this folder.

game.name: OpenGOAL - Jak II
game.desc: Native OpenGOAL port. Place your own clean PS2 Jak II ISO in this folder.

game.name: OpenGOAL - Jak 3
game.desc: Native OpenGOAL port. Place your own clean PS2 Jak 3 ISO in this folder.
